name: Batteryman C
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>池</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>メン－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>単</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>型</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If all "Batteryman C"(s) you control are in Attack Position, all Machine-Type monsters you control gain 500 ATK for each "Batteryman C" you control. If all "Batteryman C"(s) you control are in Defense Position, all Machine-Type monsters you control gain 500 DEF for each "Batteryman C" you control.
